core_stack.deployment: Docker, Caddy reverse proxy, K8s-compatible, Woodpecker CI

infrastructure_modules.name: Authentication & Identity
features: Passkey (WebAuthn FIDO2) as primary authentication — biometric, hardware-key, zero-password
Magic Link email fallback with 3-layer deduplication guard (Moka cache + Postgres advisory lock + DB upsert)
Multi-tenant WebAuthn Registry: each tenant domain gets its own Webauthn instance (eTLD+1 rp_id derivation, DB pre-warmed at startup)
Session management: cryptographically secure bearer + refresh tokens, SHA-256 hashed in DB
RBAC: UserAppPermission model (per-user, per-app-instance, role-scoped)
API token system for programmatic access

infrastructure_modules.name: Multi-Tenancy & Routing
features: True multi-tenant: single database, row-level tenant_id scoping
Tenant → AppInstance → AppDomain model: one tenant can have multiple apps (CMS, listing directory, property management)
Dynamic host-header resolution: Caddy preserves Host → Axum middleware resolves tenant_id via AppDomain table
Tenant provisioning: POST /api/admin/platform/provision/{tenant_id} bootstraps CMS + menus
Moka LRU in-process cache for AppInstance resolution (sub-millisecond tenant resolution)
TenantSetting: flexible key-value config per tenant
OnboardingProgress: trackable step-by-step onboarding state machine

infrastructure_modules.name: CMS & Content Layer
features: Block-based CMS: AppPage model with blocks_payload JSONB (Anchor-style)
Navigation menus: AppMenu with hierarchy support (parent_id, display_order)
Feed system: Feed + FeedItem for activity streams and content feeds
Template system: reusable content templates scoped per tenant
Category taxonomy: hierarchical category tree with custom categories
A/B testing infrastructure: ListingABTest + ListingABVariant with view/conversion tracking

infrastructure_modules.name: Directory & Listings
features: Listing entity: geo-tagged (lat/lng, country/state/city), priced, typed, template-backed
Ad purchase system: AdPurchase for promoted listings
Global search index: global_search_index for cross-entity search
Profile system: multi-role profiles per account

infrastructure_modules.name: Payments & Financial
features: G03 — Multi-rail ledger: atlas_ledger_entries + atlas_ledger_splits
atlas_payment_credentials: per-tenant encrypted payment provider config
Payment rails supported: Stripe, Bitcoin (mempool.space integration), Zelle, Pix (Brazilian), ACH
Bitcoin: mempool TX hash validation, price lock engine (20-min invoice window)
Brazilian market: Condomínio expense splitting (Despesas Ordinárias vs Extraordinárias)
LedgerService: unified billing entry point replacing legacy transaction tables

infrastructure_modules.name: Subscriptions
features: G04 — atlas_subscriptions: B2C recurring billing plans
SubscriptionService: plan management, status lifecycle (active/paused/cancelled)
BillingPlan + TenantSubscription for platform-tier SaaS billing

infrastructure_modules.name: File Vault & Storage
features: G02 — Secure file vault: attachment table extended with share tokens + multipart upload tracking
Backend-agnostic: R2 / S3 / local storage switch via storage_backend field
Cloudflare R2 integration: zero-egress cost for lease PDFs, media, exports
Pre-signed URL generation for secure tenant document downloads
VaultService: upload, share token generation, multipart coordination

infrastructure_modules.name: Realtime Infrastructure
features: G07 — atlas_ws_rooms_ + atlas_ws_messages: polymorphic WebSocket room model
Rooms can attach to any entity (a property, a case, a deal)
RealtimeService: room creation, message broadcast primitives

infrastructure_modules.name: AI Task Queue
features: G08 — atlas_ai_tasks: async LLM/model work queue (summarize, classify, extract, generate)
AITaskService: submit, poll, result retrieval

infrastructure_modules.name: External Integrations
features: G05 — atlas_external_integrations: PMS, OTA, AMS, GDS, Telephony connectors
atlas_integration_events: directional event log (inbound/outbound)
ExternalIntegrationService: connect, sync, event audit

infrastructure_modules.name: Verification & Trust
features: G06 — atlas_verification_requests: human + automated trust workflows (identity, document, background check, license)
VerificationService: submit, review, approve/reject lifecycle

infrastructure_modules.name: Geographic / Spatial
features: G01 — PostGIS-backed: geo_service_areas with geometry boundaries
GeoService: region lookup, boundary-intersection queries (graceful degradation in environments without PostGIS binary)

infrastructure_modules.name: Observability & Operations
features: Prometheus /metrics endpoint (bearer-token protected)
AuditLog: every user action stamped with IP + user_id
RequestLog: full HTTP request logging per user
TelemetryEvents: custom event emission per tenant
PlatformMetricsDaily: aggregated daily metrics (hourly worker)
X-Atlas-Version response header: semver + git-sha on every response

infrastructure_modules.name: Background Workers
features: OutboxWorker: SKIP LOCKED email/webhook delivery (outbox pattern)
DataSyncService: idempotent background sync (Bitcoin mempool, external data)
TelemetryService: hourly daily-metrics aggregation
WebhookSweeper: delivery retry + audit for webhook endpoints

infrastructure_modules.name: Communication Infrastructure
features: Webhook system: WebhookEndpoint + WebhookDelivery with retry
Magic link email delivery via SMTP (outbox-backed, deduplication-safe)
Headless email template system: EmailTemplate with merge fields
Telephony services (under services/telephony/)
SMS notifications via outbox pipeline

infrastructure_modules.name: Universal Scorecard Engine
features: G27 — Polymorphic structured evaluation engine: templates, dimensions, dimension options, scorecards, targets, target criteria
Context-Aware Display Rules engine (atlas_scorecard_display_rules): dynamically renders/toggles dimensions and alerts on the client using algebraic evaluation
Automatic background outbox worker: seeds scorecard time-series, dimension aggregates, and poll selection counts seamlessly
The Combinator: similarity search across scorecards to match profiles (e.g. carrier safety, MEDDIC/BANT benchmarks)
Type-Safe Leptos Component Suite: robust form configurators, nudge widgets, and inline widgets compiled with compile-time enum safety

platform_generics.name: atlas_geo

platform_generics.revenue_cases: Delivery zone pricing, localized tax enforcement, territory scoping

infrastructure_gaps.impact: Need specific views assembled per vertical
infrastructure_gaps.resolution: Customer/team builds utilizing shared-ui component wrappers

infrastructure_gaps.impact: Axum route handlers need concrete permission boundary checks
infrastructure_gaps.resolution: Wiring UserAppPermission scopes to middleware handlers

infrastructure_gaps.impact: Wired primitives exist, but active WS server execution is pending
Tasks queue is defined, but concrete LLM executor background jobs are not yet wired
infrastructure_gaps.resolution: Register LLM workers to background outbox pipelines

infrastructure_gaps.impact: Ledger splits are active, but Stripe/Pix SDK calls are not fully wired to active payouts
infrastructure_gaps.resolution: Integrate async-stripe crate calls directly inside LedgerService

infrastructure_gaps.impact: Document signature status exists, but active signing screens are not yet designed
infrastructure_gaps.resolution: Deploy secure PDF signing panel utilizing canvas rendering in Leptos

infrastructure_gaps.impact: PostgreSQL schema is ready, but local CI pipelines skip binary PostGIS validation
infrastructure_gaps.resolution: Configure standard spatial engine inside Docker/CI runners

infrastructure_gaps.impact: Connector schemas ready, but concrete PMS/OTA relays are not yet written
infrastructure_gaps.resolution: Implement concrete integration drivers (e.g. Guesty, Sabre, Salesforce AppExchange)
